use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicU64, Ordering};
use std::sync::Mutex;

static COUNTER: AtomicU64 = AtomicU64::new(0);
static GLOBAL_BUFFER: Mutex<Vec<u8>> = Mutex::new(Vec::new());

fn increment_counter() {
    COUNTER.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);
}

fn get_counter() -> u64 {
    COUNTER.load(Ordering::Relaxed)
}

fn append_to_buffer(data: &[u8]) {
    let mut buf = GLOBAL_BUFFER.lock().unwrap();
    buf.extend_from_slice(data);
}

fn process_batch(items: &[u64]) {
    for item in items {
        COUNTER.fetch_add(item, Ordering::Relaxed);
    }
}

fn main() {
    increment_counter();
    append_to_buffer(b"hello");
    process_batch(&[1, 2, 3]);
    println!("counter: {}", get_counter());
}
